title: hf-timestd Calibration File
description: Machine-readable timing calibration output for wsprdaemon integration. Written atomically by CalibrationFileWriter after each fusion cycle. Consumed by wd-ka9q-record to align wav start times to sub-millisecond accuracy.

schema_version.description: Schema version (semver). Consumers should check MAJOR for breaking changes.

processing_version.description: hf-timestd software version that produced this file.

offset_ms.description: Fused system clock offset in milliseconds. Positive means the system clock is ahead of UTC. This is the primary timing correction for wav alignment: true_time = system_time - offset_ms/1000.

uncertainty_ms.description: Combined (RSS) uncertainty of offset_ms in milliseconds, per ISO GUM. Includes statistical, systematic, and propagation components.

convergence_state.description: Kalman filter convergence state. ACQUIRING: initial convergence in progress. LOCKED: filter converged, offset is reliable. REACQUIRING: lost lock, re-converging after signal loss.

quality_grade.description: Overall quality grade. A: <0.3ms uncertainty, multi-station. B: <1ms. C: <3ms. D: >3ms or single-station.

usable.description: True when the offset is suitable for wav alignment: convergence_state==LOCKED AND uncertainty_ms<10 AND not in holdover. Consumers should check this single field for a go/no-go decision.

last_update.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this file was written.

last_update_unix.description: Unix epoch timestamp (seconds, millisecond precision) of when this file was written.

n_broadcasts.description: Number of time-standard broadcasts used in this fusion cycle (e.g. WWV 5/10/15/20/25 MHz, WWVH 2.5/5/10/15 MHz, CHU 3.33/7.85/14.67 MHz).

n_stations.description: Number of unique time-standard stations contributing (max 4: WWV, WWVH, CHU, BPM).

stations_used.description: List of station names contributing to this cycle.

statistical_ms.description: Type A uncertainty: measurement scatter (weighted std of fused observations).

systematic_ms.description: Type B uncertainty: calibration convergence error and hardware bias.

propagation_ms.description: Propagation model uncertainty: ionospheric variability and mode ambiguity.

count.description: Number of broadcasts from this station.

single_station_mode.description: True if only one station was available (no cross-validation possible).

holdover_mode.description: True if the Kalman filter is coasting on predictions (no fresh measurements).

outliers_rejected.description: Number of measurements rejected as outliers in this cycle.

adev_60s.description: Allan deviation at tau=60s (timing stability metric).
